response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that directly matches the role. Demonstrated breadth across frontend, backend, DevOps, and multiple languages, with a strong track record of shipping production systems at scale (millions of mails, millions of HTTP requests/sec). Some gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java recency, but the foundational engineering depth and craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) make these likely bridgeable.
strengths: Recent direct experience with AI agents and MCP tooling matching the role's AI requirement
Strong TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB background across multiple senior roles
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and developer tooling contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin experience not mentioned; Java exposure appears dated (pre-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less depth in the JVM ecosystem required as secondary

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of senior full-stack experience
